ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /ADJUDICATION HEARING SET FOR APR-10-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /ADJUDICATION HELD ON APR-09-2015, IN DEPT. 302. DEFENDANT INDICATES TO THE COURT THAT PARTIES HAVE COME TO AN AGREEMENT IN THIS MATTER. THE COURT CONTINUES PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION TO APRIL 10, 2015, AT 9:30 A.M., TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT IS INSTRUCTED TO RETURN TO COURT ON APRIL 10, 2015. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/RBU)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-09-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / ADJUDICATION HELD ON APR-10-2015, IN DEPT. 302. THE COURT IS INFORMED BY PARTIES THAT PARTIES HAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION WHICH WOULD ALLOW PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION TO BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND ORDERED PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS INSTRUCTED THAT PARTIES' SIGNED STIPULATION MUST BE FILED VIA E-FILING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/RBU)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-10-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Motion For Summary Judgment /Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CAROLINE J. MCCORMICK, Tel No. (925) 628-4470 specially appearing for Plaintiff Discover Bank;
Defendant LAILANE B. CATURAY, Tel No. (415) 539-6863 present in pro per.

RULING - The Court is informed by parties that parties have entered into a stipulation which would allow Plaintiff's Motion For Summary Judgment/Adjudication to be taken off calendar. The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered Plaintiff Discover Bank's Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication off calendar. Plaintiff's counsel is instructed that parties' signed stipulation must be filed via e-filing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant LAILANE B. CATURAY, Tel No. (415) 539-6863 present in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defendant did not notify the Court or Plaintiff of her intent to appear today. Defendant indicates to the Court that parties have come to an agreement in this matter. The Court continues PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION to April 10, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. to give Plaintiff the opportunity to respond to Defendant's claim. Defendant is instructed to return to court on April 10, 2015. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Continued To Apr-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - LAILANE B. CATURAY, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 9, 2015 TO GIVE THE DEFENDANT AN OPORTUNITY TO FILE HER OPPOSITION. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb
